members.name: _runCanvas2D
members.description:
Full canvas2d particle engine.
origin / target are 0-1 fractions of canvas dimensions.
Each preset type gets its own spawn + update behaviour.

members.name: _target
members.description: First painted element assigned to the default slot.

members.name: _rebind
members.description: Flush existing inner-element listeners then re-bind to the current DOM.

members.name: attributePlaceholders
members.default: { icon: '/icons/my-icon.svg or assets/image.png', alt: 'Icon description for accessibility' }

members.name: resize
members.description: Re-compute canvas size from container. Call after programmatic size changes.

members.name: attributeOptions
members.default: { layout: ['grid-auto', 'grid', 'flex', 'block'], cols: ['1', '2', '3', '4'], direction: ['row', 'column'], gap: ['sm', 'md', 'lg', 'xl'], width: ['full', 'three-quarters', 'half', 'quarter'], justify: ['start', 'center', 'end', 'between', 'around', 'evenly'], align: ['start', 'center', 'end', 'stretch', 'baseline'] }

members.name: attributeConditions
members.default: { cols: (element: HTMLElement) => { const layout = element.getAttribute('layout') || 'grid-auto'; return layout === 'grid'; }, direction: (element: HTMLElement) => { const layout = element.getAttribute('layout') || 'grid-auto'; return layout === 'flex'; } }

members.name: _setActive
members.description: Moves `active` to `target`, removes it from all siblings.

members.name: _syncActiveFromPath
members.description:
For nc-a items with auto-active: set active on the item whose href
matches the current pathname. Handles exact and prefix matches.

members.name: _getTabItems
members.description: Returns all direct nc-tab-item children (light DOM).

members.name: _buildTabBar
members.description:
Rebuilds the tab bar buttons from child nc-tab-item labels,
then syncs the active attribute on each tab item panel.

members.name: _selectTab
members.description: Selects a tab by index - updates state, DOM, host attribute, and emits event.
